name: local_file_open
description: Open Windows File Explorer to a folder or reveal a file by path.
author: OpenAI

examples.prompt: 打開 D:\KM資料庫 這個資料夾
在檔案總管顯示並選取 D:\KM資料庫\切割機\規格書.pdf

path.description: Absolute Windows path to a file or folder that should be opened in File Explorer.

mode.description: Use 'open' to open a folder or parent folder, or 'select' to reveal and select a file or folder.
